raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX my credit card was charged for {$3300.00} for an item that I never ordered. 
I got a refund from the Citi bank twice and now again they are telling me that I'm responsible for this purchase. 
The bank sent me a letter as an evidence that they were communicated with me, but actually it wasn't me since email address and phone number was wrong it wasn't mine. 
Ups requested a signature for delivered item and it was never signed by me.And even XXXX wrote that they didn't have account with provided email address. 
I called Citi Bank many times and no one is trying to solve this problem.
